response.justification: While this candidate is a highly experienced senior developer with strong software craftsmanship practices and communication skills, they lack the core mandatory requirements for the role. C++ experience is minimal (approximately 6 months documented at National Instruments), Windows platform development is not demonstrated, SQL Server/Oracle expertise is absent, and there is no fixed income or capital markets domain experience. The candidate's background is primarily full-stack web development with TypeScript/Node.js, fundamentally misaligned with the capital markets C++ systems role.
strengths: 16+ years of professional software development experience with demonstrated seniority across multiple domains and companies
Strong CI/CD and DevOps expertise with hands-on experience setting up GitLab, CI servers, Docker, and deployment infrastructure
Excellent communication and mentorship skills evidenced by multiple workshops, talks, and open-source educational projects
concerns: Severe C++ experience gap: only ~6 months documented versus the mandatory requirement of 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development
No demonstrated Windows platform development; background is heavily centered on Linux, web technologies, and containerized environments
Absent fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise—the role requires at least one of these areas
